Guangzhou travel journal

Trip sections
Arrival & Old GuangzhouXiguan & YongqingfangYuexiu & ChimelongBaiyun MountainScience Centre & Canton Tower
10 May 2026 – 15 May 2026

Guangzhou

Six days across Old Guangzhou, Chimelong, Baiyun Mountain, and Canton Tower.

Sunday, 10 May

Day 1 - Arrival & Old Guangzhou

Route
樟宜机场Zhāngyí Jīchǎng→广州白云国际机场Guǎngzhōu Báiyún Guójì Jīchǎng→朴居酒店Pǔjū Jiǔdiàn→侨美食家Qiáoměi Shíjiā→沙面岛Shāmiàn Dǎo→珠江Zhū Jiāng→万菱广场Wànlíng Guǎngchǎng→石室圣心大教堂Shíshì Shèngxīn Dà Jiàotáng→天字码头Tiānzì Mǎtóu→海珠广场Hǎizhū Guǎngchǎng

After an early flight from Singapore, we dropped our bags near Beijing Road and headed out for roasted pigeon and pork. We spent the afternoon around Shamian Island and Sacred Heart Cathedral, then ended the day on a Pearl River night cruise.

Sacred Heart Cathedral

Guangzhou Sacred Heart Cathedral · 广州圣心大教堂

Shamian Island

A quiet pause among Shamian's tree-lined streets

侨美食家

Qiáoměi Shíjiā · Family lunch

Starbucks stop

A playful photo stop on our first day

Hotel breakfast

Breakfast before heading into Old Guangzhou

朴居酒店

Pǔjū Jiǔdiàn · Our first hotel room

侨美食家

Qiáoměi Shíjiā · Roast pigeon

侨美食家

Qiáoměi Shíjiā · Cantonese lunch

沙面岛

Shāmiàn Dǎo · Tree-lined architecture

石室圣心大教堂

Shíshì Shèngxīn Dà Jiàotáng · Gothic stonework

绿岛西餐厅

Lǜdǎo Xīcāntīng · Dinner setting

绿岛西餐厅

Lǜdǎo Xīcāntīng · Steak and prawns

Monday, 11 May

Day 2 - Xiguan & Yongqingfang

Route
上下九步行街Shàngxiàjiǔ Bùxíngjiē→东急新天地购物广场Dōngjí Xīntiāndì Gòuwù Guǎngchǎng→莲香楼Liánxiāng Lóu→永庆坊Yǒngqìng Fāng→粤剧艺术博物馆Yuèjù Yìshù Bówùguǎn→动漫星城Dòngmàn Xīngchéng→万国奥特莱斯Wànguó Àotèláisī→文通冰室Wéntōng Bīngshì→北京路步行街Běijīng Lù Bùxíngjiē→大佛寺Dàfó Sì

We spent the day around Xiguan, moving between traditional Cantonese food, restored lane houses, the Cantonese Opera Museum, and Yongqingfang's small design details. After dinner, Beijing Road and the illuminated Dafo Temple closed out the night.

Yongqingfang

Calligraphy and neighbourhood stories

Shangxiajiu

A Guangzhou-shaped ice cream along the walk

Cantonese Opera Museum

Traditional architecture inside the museum grounds

Yongqingfang

Wing Chun heritage inside the restored Xiguan lanes

Yongqingfang

New colour woven into old grey-brick architecture

Yongqingfang

A sculpted streetscape detail

Saizeriya lunch

Lunch before exploring more of Xiguan

文通冰室

Men Tong Bing Sutt · Dinner

永庆坊

Yǒngqìng Fāng · Bruce Lee heritage

万国奥特莱斯

Wànguó Àotèláisī · Outlet stop

Tuesday, 12 May

Day 3 - Yuexiu & Chimelong

Route
越秀公园Yuèxiù Gōngyuán→五羊石像Wǔyáng Shíxiàng→长隆野生动物世界Chánglóng Yěshēng Dòngwù Shìjiè→长隆国际大马戏Chánglóng Guójì Dà Mǎxì

The morning began in Yuexiu Park before a full afternoon at Chimelong Safari Park. Cable-car views, close wildlife encounters, and the evening circus made this the most animated day of the trip.

Yuexiu Park

Zhenhai Tower in Guangzhou's largest central park

Yuexiu Park

A park regular taking it easy

Chimelong Safari Park

Starting the afternoon safari

Chimelong Safari Park

The Africa section of the safari route

Chimelong Safari Park

Along the forest trail

Chimelong Safari Park

Toucan along the walking route

Chimelong Safari Park

Tigers along the shaded trail

Chimelong Safari Park

Koala habitat

Chimelong Safari Park

Panda feeding time

Chimelong International Circus

Inside before the main acts

Chimelong International Circus

The evening performance

Chimelong International Circus

Motorcycle globe act

Wednesday, 13 May

Day 4 - Baiyun Mountain

Route
白云山Báiyún Shān→摩星岭Móxīng Lǐng→足足有愉Zúzú Yǒuyú→正佳广场Zhèngjiā Guǎngchǎng

We took the cable car up Baiyun Mountain and continued on foot to Moxing Summit, the mountain's 382-metre high point. After the climb, we stopped at 足足有愉 for a massage before ending the day at Zhengjia Plaza in Tianhe.

Baiyun Mountain

A shaded rest point on the climb

Moxing Summit

Guangzhou from 382 metres

Massage stop

A quiet break after Baiyun Mountain

Moxing Summit

Together at the top of Baiyun Mountain

Baiyun Mountain cable car

The ride up the mountain

宜致酒店

Yízhì Jiǔdiàn · Our room in Guangzhou

北京烤鸭

Běijīng Kǎoyā · Meituan supper

Thursday, 14 May

Day 5 - Science Centre & Canton Tower

Route
广东科学中心Guǎngdōng Kēxué Zhōngxīn→东山口Dōngshānkǒu→广州塔Guǎngzhōu Tǎ→广州塔摩天轮Guǎngzhōu Tǎ Mótiānlún→天河Tiānhé

Hands-on exhibits filled the morning at Guangdong Science Centre. We then wandered through Dongshankou's East-meets-West streets before heading up Canton Tower for the Bubble Tram and sunset over the Pearl River.

Guangdong Science Centre

The science centre's sweeping entrance

Guangdong Science Centre

Driving simulator exhibit

Dongshankou

Historic architecture among the neighbourhood's cafes and galleries

Tianhe

Dinner on the hot plate

Tea break

A cold CHAGEE stop between plans

Canton Tower

Above Guangzhou before sunset

Canton Tower

Tianhe and the Pearl River from above

Canton Tower

The Pearl River below

Canton Tower Bubble Tram

Sunset over the Pearl River

Canton Tower

A final look back at the tower

秘密旅行

Mìmì Lǚxíng · Lunch

秘密旅行西餐厅

Mìmì Lǚxíng Xīcāntīng · Dongshankou lunch

卡朋西餐

Kǎpéng Xīcān · Dinner near Guangzhou Tower

广州塔摩天轮

Guǎngzhōu Tǎ Mótiānlún · Bubble Tram

Friday, 15 May

Day 6 - Departure

Route
宜致酒店Yízhì Jiǔdiàn→广州白云国际机场T3航站楼Guǎngzhōu Báiyún Guójì Jīchǎng T3 Hángzhànlóu→樟宜机场Zhāngyí Jīchǎng

We left early for the airport and flew home, arriving back in Singapore by mid-afternoon.
